issueDatetime.description: The date and time the RSA was issued.

quantity.description: The number of restricted shares granted.

acquisitionCost.description: The total acquisition cost paid by the holder for the restricted shares.

equityPlanId.description: The identifier of the equity plan from which the RSA was issued.

shareClassId.description: The identifier of the share class. May be absent if the plan has no associated share class.

vestingScheduleTemplateId.description: The identifier of the vesting schedule template. May be absent if the RSA has no vesting schedule.

schema_def.description: The issuance transaction for an RSA. Represents the initial grant of restricted stock.
